title: Strategy CEO eyes more preferred stock to fund Bitcoin buys
description: Strategy CEO Phong Le says the company is moving away from issuing and selling common stock to buy Bitcoin and isn't interested in acquiring Bitcoin treasuries.

title: Ether set for another ‘V-shaped recovery,’ Tom Lee says
description: Fundstrat's Tom Lee argues Ether is close to the bottom and says investors should be thinking about opportunities instead of selling.

title: Russia is blocking WhatsApp to push ‘surveillance’ app, company says
description: Russian news outlets reported on Wednesday that WhatsApp’s domain had been completely blocked and was inaccessible without a VPN or another workaround.

title: Thailand approves crypto as underlying assets in derivatives markets
description: Binance Thailand’s CEO says it is a “watershed moment” for digital assets in the country, as they are no longer being treated as mere speculative instruments.

title: Ethereum developers suggest using ZK tech to anonymize AI use
description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin and the Ethereum Foundation’s head of AI have proposed a method to keep users’ AI API calls private while still allowing punishment for abuse.

title: Crypto lender halted withdrawals during Bitcoin’s fall last week
description: Despite the deposit and withdrawal halt, BlockFills customers can still place trades on the platform to open and close positions.

title: US fines Paxful $4M for moving funds tied to trafficking, fraud
description: US prosecutors said Paxful marketed itself as a non-KYC platform and presented anti-money laundering policies that it knew “were not implemented or enforced.”

title: X Money ‘external beta’ will go live in 1-2 months, Musk says
description: The tech billionaire revealed X Money will launch in limited beta before rolling out globally as part of the firm’s “everything app” strategy.

title: Coinbase unveils crypto wallets designed specifically for AI agents
description: Users can set controls and permissions to allow the AI agent to manage liquidity positions and execute trades at any time of day, Coinbase said.

title: Chainlink feeds go live for Ondo tokenized US stocks on Ethereum
description: Price feeds for SPYon, QQQon and TSLAon are now live on Ethereum, allowing the Ondo-issued tokenized equities to be used as collateral in DeFi lending markets.

title: Democratic lawmakers slam SEC Chair Atkins over crypto enforcement
description: A House Committee on Financial Services hearing on Wednesday dredged up concerns about the pro-crypto regulatory shift under the Trump administration.

title: Bitcoin futures data shows bears gearing up for an assault on $60K

description: Bitcoin price crumbled back toward its 2026 low as a lack of fresh capital inflows, weak investor sentiment, and rising selling in spot markets chipped away at the $66,000 level.

title: Deel taps MoonPay to roll out stablecoin salary payouts in UK, EU
description: Deel will enable its customers to pay workers in the United Kingdom and European Union, with a US expansion planned later.

title: BlackRock enters DeFi, taps Uniswap for institutional token trading
description: BlackRock is bringing its $2.1 billion tokenized Treasury fund to Uniswap, expanding institutional access to DeFi and deepening Wall Street’s push into onchain finance.

title: Malaysia's central bank announces stablecoin, tokenization sandbox
description: The pilot programs explore wholesale settlement between institutions and real-world use cases, along with stablecoin development and tokenized bank deposits.

title: When will Bitcoin start a new bull cycle toward $150K? Look for these signs
description: Bitcoin price could still reach $150,000 by year-end, but several things must happen for BTC price to find its technical footing and spark a new bull run.

description: Bitcoin volatility spiked on the back of surprisingly strong US nonfarm payrolls numbers, but traders retained $50,000 BTC price targets. Will a Fed rate decision lead to a bullish outcome?
